labels.analysis: The MCP Server "4fetch" provides 1 tools for development tools tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Development Tools" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.

tools.name: fetch
tools.title: Fetch URL
tools.description: Fetch a public web page, extract its core content, and return it as clean Markdown with metadata (title, description, language, site name). Returns structured JSON with success/error status and semantic error codes. URL must be http or https.

url.description: Absolute URL of the page to fetch (must be http or https).
